text:
| **Session lifecycle** | `session_start` hook received, stale session cancelled (with reason: same_pid/same_pane), re-assert (engine already running), session engine spawned with agent+channel+session, session engine exited | [...]    - **`src/daemon/server/session_start.rs`**
     - Added `tracing::debug!(agent, harness, channel, "session_start hook received")` after harness is inferred
     - Stale session cancellation: added `tracing::info!` with reason (same_pid/same_pane)
     - Idempotent re-assert: added `tracing::info!(agent, session, channel, "session re-assert: engine already running")`
     - `ensure_channel_ready` timeout: removed debug-gate, → `tracing::warn!`
     - Subscription failure: `tracing::warn!` replacing debug-gated `eprintln!`
     - Final session started: `tracing::info!(agent, channel, session, codename, harness, "session started")`
